package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for slow_work_inside_transaction_scope: Loop-heavy or slow work performed while a transaction appears open.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: warning.
func scenario397Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
